title: UltimateColorLibrary
body:
This is just a mod version of my library *UltimateColorLibrary* which you can find here : https://github.com/MoreOwO/UltimateColorLibrary.

It will be required by future updates of my other mod *Chat-Pimper* and by any other mod i'll do with needs of colors manipulation.

This mod does nothing by itself and is just a library required by other mods.
Feel free to use this library if you want to use UCL.

Please refer to Github if you want to use it in your project.

If you have any question, open an issue on github or send me a dm on discord `@moreowo`
